---
name: Pull Request
about: Contribute or update a skill in ICCS-SKILLS
title: "docs(SKILLS): <skill-name> skill"
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Skill Details

- **Name:**
- **Directory:**
- **Type:** New skill / Update existing / Removal

## Description

Briefly describe the skill or the changes made.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read and followed the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Frontmatter is present with correct `name` and `description`
- [ ] The skill content is well-structured and actionable
- [ ] [SKILLS.md](SKILLS.md) has been updated (for new skills)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) convention
